[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A close-up, motion-blurred view shows a person’s face and mouth area while a bright light from the lower right partially illuminates the scene.  

Main Subject:  
The main focus is a person’s face, especially the lower half around the mouth and chin, with strong blur from camera movement or motion.  

Setting:  
The scene appears to be indoors or in a low, dark background because most of the surrounding area is dark and indistinct. Lighting is warm and uneven, with a bright, out-of-focus light source in the lower right.  

Visual Details:  
The image is dominated by warm beige and golden tones across the face, with darker areas around the edges. The mouth and lower facial area show reddish-pink blur, and fine hair strands are visible near the lower left. The right side includes a bright, circular glow that is out of focus, likely from a light source or screen. The camera angle is very close to the face, cropping out most features above and around the mouth, and the composition is tight and off-center with heavy motion blur.  

Visible Text:  
No important visible text detected.  

Practical Summary:  
The image is a very close, motion-blurred photo of a person’s face, emphasizing the mouth area. A bright, out-of-focus light near the lower right casts warm illumination on the blurred features.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
